description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front yard features three palm trees planted in red-tiled beds, and there is a driveway with three parked cars. The facade is predominantly white with large rectangular windows and a balcony on the upper floor. The property includes a side yard with benches and a secondary building, possibly a guest house or garage, connected by a paved walkway. The main entryway is accentuated by a small overhang and a set of steps, while the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, white multi-story house with a flat roof, palm trees in the front yard, and a driveway with parked cars. Features large windows, a balcony, and a secondary building connected by a walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, three palm trees, driveway with cars, and the main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, benches, secondary building, and the connection between structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, flat roof sections, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, cars, palm trees, and the side of the main and secondary buildings.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, steps, and a simple modern door, flanked by large windows.
